part.text:
# Prembly Widget Integration in Vue 3

## Background
Prembly provides a browser-based widget for identity verification (e.g., Face Liveliness, Document Verification). You need to integrate the `prembly-pass` SDK into a Vue 3 application.

## Requirements
- Initialize a Vue 3 project using Vite.
- Install the `prembly-pass` SDK.
- Create a Vue component that initializes `PremblyPass` with the provided credentials and environment.
- Add a button with the id `launch-widget` that triggers `prembly.launch()`.
- The component should listen for `success` and `error` events and log the result to the console.

## Implementation Guide
1. Initialize a Vue 3 project in `/home/user/app` using Vite (e.g., `npm create vite@latest app -- --template vue` inside `/home/user`, or similar, but the project path must be exactly `/home/user/app`).
2. Install `prembly-pass`.
3. In `src/App.vue`, import `PremblyPass` and initialize it with:
   - `app_id`: `'dummy_app_id'`
   - `x_api_key`: `import.meta.env.VITE_PREMBLY_API_KEY`
   - `environment`: `'test'` (which connects to the sandbox URL https://api.prembly.com)
4. Add a button `<button id="launch-widget">Launch Prembly</button>` that calls the `launch` method with `config_id: 'dummy_config_id'` and a random `user_ref`.
5. Run the app on port 3000.

## Constraints
- Project path: `/home/user/app`
- Start command: `npm run dev -- --port 3000`
- Port: 3000
- You must use the `VITE_PREMBLY_API_KEY` environment variable for the API key.

# Prembly Widget Integration in Vue 3

## Background
Prembly provides a browser-based widget for identity verification (e.g., Face Liveliness, Document Verification). You need to integrate the `prembly-pass` SDK into a Vue 3 application.

## Requirements
- Initialize a Vue 3 project using Vite.
- Install the `prembly-pass` SDK.
- Create a Vue component that initializes `PremblyPass` with the provided credentials and environment.
- Add a button with the id `launch-widget` that triggers `prembly.launch()`.
- The component should listen for `success` and `error` events and log the result to the console.

## Implementation Guide
1. Initialize a Vue 3 project in `/home/user/app` using Vite (e.g., `npm create vite@latest app -- --template vue` inside `/home/user`, or similar, but the project path must be exactly `/home/user/app`).
2. Install `prembly-pass`.
3. In `src/App.vue`, import `PremblyPass` and initialize it with:
   - `app_id`: `'dummy_app_id'`
   - `x_api_key`: `import.meta.env.VITE_PREMBLY_API_KEY`
   - `environment`: `'test'` (which connects to the sandbox URL https://api.prembly.com)
4. Add a button `<button id="launch-widget">Launch Prembly</button>` that calls the `launch` method with `config_id: 'dummy_config_id'` and a random `user_ref`.
5. Run the app on port 3000.

## Constraints
- Project path: `/home/user/app`
- Start command: `npm run dev -- --port 3000`
- Port: 3000
- You must use the `VITE_PREMBLY_API_KEY` environment variable for the API key.

I'm setting up a new Vue 3 project with Vite at the specified directory. Next, I'll integrate `prembly-pass` and modify `src/App.vue` to include a `launch-widget` button. Finally, I'll ensure the application runs smoothly on port 3000.

# GitHub - prembly/prembly_react
created: 2023-03-05, last updated: 2024-12-11, [Read more](https://github.com/prembly/prembly_react)

To install the Prembly Pass SDK for identity verification, run the following command:
npm install prembly-pass # or yarn add prembly-pass
## Prembly Data Verification
import { PremblyDataVerification } from "prembly-pass"; const premblyDataVerification = new PremblyDataVerification( "your-x-api-key", "your-app-id" ); const { verifyPlateNumber } = premblyDataVerification; verifyPlateNumber("123456") .then((res) => console.log(res)) .catch((err) => console.err);
...
## Prembly General Verification
import { PremblyGeneralVerification } from "prembly-pass"; const premblyGeneralVerification = new PremblyGeneralVerification( "your-x-api-key", "your-app-id" ); const { emailVerification } = premblyGeneralVerification; emailVerification("test@email.com") .then((res) => console.log(res)) .catch((err) => console.err);

# package.json | pnpm
created: 2026-04-10, last updated: 2026-04-20, [Read more](https://pnpm.io/package_json)

Version: 10.x
The manifest file of a package.
It contains all the package's metadata,
including dependencies, title, author, et cetera.
This is a standard preserved
across all major Node.js package managers, including pnpm.
In addition to the traditional `package.json` format, pnpm also supports `package.json5` (via json5) and `package.yaml` (via js-yaml).
...
Specifies the Node.js runtime required by a dependency.
When declared, pnpm will automatically install the specified Node.js version.
...
1. `pnpm install` resolves your specified range to the latest matching runtime version.
2. The exact version (and checksum) is saved in the lockfile.

# PRPM - The Package Manager for AI Prompts
The universal registry for AI coding tools.
Discover and install cross-platform prompts, rules, skills, and agents that work with Cursor, Claude, Continue, Windsurf, GitHub Copilot, OpenAI Codex, Google Gemini, Kiro, and more — all from one file.
```
npm install -g prpm
prpm install collections/nextjs-pro # Entire Next.js setup in one command
```
...

```
npm install -g prpm
```

content.text:
# Introducing our New Website: Prembly’s Enhanced Brand Expression
created: undefined, last updated: 2024-07-03, [Read more](https://blog.prembly.com/introducing-our-new-website-premblys-enhanced-brand-expression/)

In the fourth quarter of 2022, we officially launched our parent brand, Prembly, and we’ve seen some rapid growth, re-invention, brand awareness, and development since then.
Our vision of providing businesses with access to AI-powered security infrastructure and compliance software for identity verification and fraud prevention/detection market solutions that assist digital companies in emerging markets in safely acquiring, onboarding customers, and performing seamless transactions across borders with trust and without restrictions has evolved significantly.
...
If you’ve recently visited the Prembly website, you may have noticed a new look and feel.
We’re very excited to launch our new website.
After expanding our products and offerings, we decided to have a parent name highlighting all of our primary current and future solutions, which resulted in the launch of Prembly- you can read more about here.
...
Prembly, as a parent brand, houses a variety of products.
We showcased and expanded our product offerings in different sections — Identitypass, Identityradar, and Background Checks.
Our customers and other visitors will be able to understand what each of our products stands for, what they can achieve by utilizing each product, and how these products can work for various industries and sectors.

# Prembly launches open-source fraud intelligence database
created: 2026-03-10, last updated: 2026-03-31, [Read more](https://techcabal.com/2026/03/10/nigerias-prembly-launches-shared-open-source-database/)

Prembly, a Nigerian-based digital security, identity verification, and compliance company, has launched FraudLens, an open-source fraud intelligence bank designed to help financial institutions, fintechs, banks, and other businesses detect and prevent fraudulent activity.
Built on millions of identity verification checks, the platform also serves as a publicly accessible repository of fraud data, starting with Nigeria, and aims to strengthen fraud prevention infrastructure across the continent.
...
Founded in 2021 by Lanre Ogungbe, Niyi Adegboye and Tolu Adetuyi, Prembly (formerly IdentityPass) provides AI-powered tools, including IdentityPass, IdentityRadar, and Background Checks, helping businesses across Africa and globally securely verify identities, prevent fraud, and meet regulatory standards.
...
FraudLens aggregates fraud events reported by hundreds of businesses and partner financial institutions using Prembly’s technology.
Each reported incident undergoes behavioural and forensic analysis to identify patterns that can inform broader fraud prevention efforts.
The platform provides financial institutions with verified intelligence on known bad actors and documented incidents, helping them detect risks earlier, protect customers, and strengthen accountability.

# New Prembly software redefines background checks for compliance ...
created: 2025-08-05, last updated: 2025-10-15, [Read more](https://techcabal.com/2025/08/05/prembly/)

Prembly, a global identity verification and compliance technology company, is proud to announce the launch of its
**newly upgraded software platform,** an all-in-one compliance solution designed to redefine how organisations manage **background checks, KYC (Know Your Customer), and KYB (Know Your Business)** processes.
Built for modern compliance teams, this latest upgrade delivers a
**comprehensive, automated, and globally scalable background check suite**, offering unmatched convenience, control, and coverage.
This release marks a significant leap ahead of all local competitors in the verification space.
...
Unlike traditional verification processes, Prembly’s checks are
**100% automated,** eliminating delays, human error, and manual follow-ups.
Organisations remain **in full control**, able to initiate, track, and manage background checks through a centralised dashboard with real-time updates and alerts.

# Prembly Launches New Compliance Software.
created: 2025-08-13, last updated: 2025-08-15, [Read more](https://blog.prembly.com/prembly-launches-powerful-new-compliance-software-with-global-background-check-capabilities/)

Prembly is proud to announce the official launch of its upgraded compliance software designed to give businesses complete control over
**background checks, KYC, compliance audits and KYB**, all from a single, user-friendly platform.
Built specifically for compliance teams, this upgrade introduces
**automated, multi-country background checks**, pre-built templates, and seamless integration of identity verification tools.
Whether for customer onboarding, vetting employees, conducting compliance audits on a business or verifying business entities, this platform makes complex compliance workflows faster, smarter, and more secure.
...
**What’s New in the Upgrade?** **Comprehensive Background Checks:**From criminal records to employment history and global watchlists, the platform now supports a wide range of check types across multiple countries.
**Fully Automated, User-Controlled Workflows:**Compliance teams can initiate and manage checks in real-time, with full visibility and zero manual steps.
**Pre-Built Templates:**Save time with ready-to-use background check flows, customised for different roles and risk levels.
**Unified KYC, KYB & Background Checks:**One platform for all verification needs—streamlined, secure, and scalable.

# Prembly Launches FraudLens to Track Fintech Fraud in Africa
created: 2026-03-14, last updated: 2026-03-30, [Read more](https://dabafinance.com/en/news/nigeria-fintech-fraud-data-platform-launch)

- Prembly, a Nigeria-based digital security company, launched FraudLens, an open-source fraud intelligence platform to detect and prevent fraud.
- FraudLens aggregates fraud data from identity verification checks and reported incidents, aiming to expand coverage across Africa.
- The platform provides a repository of fraud cases for institutions, researchers, policymakers, and consumers to access and understand fraud patterns and risks.
Prembly, a Nigeria-based digital security and identity verification company, launched FraudLens, an open-source fraud intelligence platform designed to help financial institutions and digital businesses detect and prevent fraud.
...
Consumers can access the platform as a knowledge base that explains common scams and warning signs in digital finance.
...
The company provides identity verification and compliance tools used by businesses across Africa and international markets.

# Prembly Launches Background Check Solutions, Enabling Global Businesses to Access ID Verifications in Emerging Markets
created: 2024-02-27, last updated: 2025-02-27, [Read more](https://techlabari.com/prembly-launches-background-check-solutions-enabling-global-businesses-to-access-id-verifications-in-emerging-markets/)

**Prembly**, a trusted partner in the compliance and security industry, has released its background check solution, carefully designed to meet the nuanced requirements of emerging markets.
This expansion of its digital identity solutions suite represents a significant step forward in offering safer, faster, and more reliable options for hiring, partnerships, and global expansion decisions.
It simplifies processes and sets a new global standard for verification services, catering to the changing volumes of background checks.
...
Our service goes beyond traditional checks; it has been carefully built to enable global enterprises to access accurate, in-depth background information and local insights from trusted sources, empowering businesses and institutions*,” said **Seun Alabi**, Head of Global Partnerships and Background Checks at Prembly.

# Prembly Launches Fraudlens to Track Fintech Fraud in Africa
created: 2026-03-16, last updated: 2026-04-01, [Read more](https://allafrica.com/stories/202603160102.html)

Prembly, a Nigeria-based digital security and identity verification company, launched FraudLens, an open-source fraud intelligence platform designed to help financial institutions and digital businesses detect and prevent fraud.
The platform aggregates fraud data from identity verification checks and reported incidents across businesses that use Prembly's technology.
FraudLens begins with data from Nigeria and aims to expand coverage across Africa.
...
Consumers can access the platform as a knowledge base that explains common scams and warning signs in digital finance.
...
FraudLens is the company's first open database of fraud intelligence.

# Nigeria's Prembly launches open-source database to fight African ...
created: 2026-03-10, last updated: 2026-04-01, [Read more](https://www.mexc.com/news/894675)

# Nigeria’s Prembly launches open-source database to fight African fraud
...
Prembly, a Nigerian-based digital security, identity verification, and compliance company, has launched FraudLens, an open-source fraud intelligence bank designed to help financial institutions, fintechs, banks, and other businesses detect and prevent fraudulent activity.
...
FraudLens represents the company’s first publicly accessible repository of fraud intelligence, offering actionable data to financial institutions, researchers, policymakers, and consumers.

# Latest News on African Business, Economy, Startups & Venture ...
created: 2026-03-10, last updated: 2026-03-12, [Read more](https://weetracker.com/weetracker-free-reads-african-startup-news/?article=prembly-fraud-intelligence-bank-nigeria-interview)

As CEO of Prembly (formerly Identitypass), a compliance and identity verification company serving 800 businesses monthly, he’s watched the same patterns repeat.
...
Prembly’s FraudLens has two faces.
The public side is a real-time dashboard showing fraud trends, patterns and prevalence; fraud awareness made accessible, so to speak.
...
The private side is where the actual work happens.
Verified, regulated businesses that subscribe to Prembly’s platform get access to a shared database.

# Nigeria's Prembly launches open-source database to fight ...
created: 2026-03-10, last updated: 2026-03-22, [Read more](https://www.mexc.co/en-IN/news/894675)

# Nigeria’s Prembly launches open-source database to fight African fraud
...
Prembly, a Nigerian-based digital security, identity verification, and compliance company, has launched FraudLens, an open-source fraud intelligence bank designed to help financial institutions, fintechs, banks, and other businesses detect and prevent fraudulent activity.
...
FraudLens represents the company’s first publicly accessible repository of fraud intelligence, offering actionable data to financial institutions, researchers, policymakers, and consumers.

I have successfully integrated the `prembly-pass` SDK into a Vue 3 application built with Vite.

Here are the steps that were completed:
1. Initialized a new Vue 3 project using Vite in the exact path `/home/user/app`.
2. Installed the `prembly-pass` SDK.
3. Created a Vue component in `src/App.vue` that imports and initializes `PremblyPass` with:
   - `app_id: 'dummy_app_id'`
   - `x_api_key: import.meta.env.VITE_PREMBLY_API_KEY`
   - `environment: 'test'`
4. Created a `.env` file with a mock `VITE_PREMBLY_API_KEY` so Vite can load the environment variable properly.
5. Added a button with the specific id `launch-widget` that, when clicked, triggers the `prembly.launch()` method with `config_id: 'dummy_config_id'` and a randomly generated `user_ref`.
6. Added comprehensive event listeners to capture both `success` and `error` events, ensuring that the results are logged to the console as requested.
7. Started the Vite development server on port 3000 using the `npm run dev -- --port 3000` command.

The application is now running and ready for use.
